recommendation_rationale: Fase 4 read-only planning over the seems_source_genuine set (3,880 entries) can proceed safely if the 4 quarantined corrupt entries are excluded from the planning input set per lapidarium_fase4a_corrupt_path_exclusion_list.json. A separate Fase 4B should repair the Fase 1 generator's quoting/escaping bug so future regenerations of fase1_triagem_classificacao.json do not reintroduce shell-fragment or import-token leakage into path fields.

weird_tracked_file_evidence.path_literal_note: filename contains the two literal characters backslash-n (not a real newline) followed by a space and a trailing backslash
weird_tracked_file_evidence.first_bytes_escaped_text_excerpt: S^HSU^HUM^HMM^HMA^HAR^HRY^HY O^HOF^HF L^HLE^HES^HSS^HS C^HCO^HOM^HMM^HMA^HAN^HND^HDS^HS ... (SUMMARY OF LESS COMMANDS, with 0x08 backspace overstrike bytes between each duplicated letter pair, the classic less/man pager bold-text rendering technique)
weird_tracked_file_evidence.byte_0x08_meaning: ASCII backspace, used by less/man to fake bold/underline via character-overstrike when rendered to a non-formatting terminal/file
weird_tracked_file_evidence.interpretation: captured output of a pager help screen (e.g. less --help or man's SUMMARY OF LESS COMMANDS), most likely produced when a malformed shell command (containing an unescaped POSIX character class like [:alnum:] and stray backslash-n) was redirected to a file whose name became the leftover unparsed command fragment

markdown_drift_detected.description: CURRENT_STATE.md and NEXT_ACTION.md currently render unrelated ARIS-CONTEXT-P19/P18 historical entries at their head rather than the canonical Lapidarium Fase 3 state recorded in ACTIVE_CONTEXT_STATE.json. Per the anti-corruption contract (json_beats_markdown=true, markdown_conflict_policy=fail_closed), ACTIVE_CONTEXT_STATE.json was treated as sole authority for this packet and the Markdown drift was not corrected as part of this artifact-only task.

pre_existing_unstaged_governance_repo_ch.description: These five files had pre-existing unstaged modifications (insertions only, appearing to duplicate older ARIS-CONTEXT-P15/P16/P18/P19 ledger entries) before this task began. They were not created or modified by this task and were deliberately excluded from the commit in this packet.
